items.description: Deterministic DAG generation (same inputs → same plan hash)
items.evidence: PlannerAgent._hash() uses SHA-256 on canonical JSON; test_deterministic_planning_handoff validates same-intent same-proposal

items.description: Tenant isolation: all agents enforce tenant_id parameter
items.evidence: Every public method carries tenant_id; IsolationViolation raised when missing; test_tenant_isolation covers all 3 agents

items.description: Deterministic trace correlation with SHA-256 hash chain
items.evidence: OrchestrationTraceCorrelator generates og_<SHA256> IDs; record_event chains hashes; verify_full_propagation validates chain integrity

items.description: Cross-tenant scope verification in critic agent
items.evidence: CriticAgent.evaluate_plan checks scope_verified flag for cross-tenant transitions; G-P3 guard enforces same rule in state machine
All exceptions in orchestration modules are typed (ValueError, TypeError, etc.)

items.description: No global mutable state in agents
items.evidence: All agent state is per-instance (self._plan_history, self._state, etc.); no module-level dicts/lists

items.description: Deterministic handoff: same input → same output path
items.evidence: Planner → Critic → Optimizer pipeline is deterministic; test_handoff_produces_consistent_path validates full chain
All 3 agents raise IsolationViolation when tenant_id is empty/None; tests verify immediate stop
G-P4 guard blocks same-plan_hash transitions; PlannerAgent.adapt_on_failure returns STOP on identical plan; oscillation count increments

items.description: No direct core import in orchestration agents
items.evidence: All agents import only from core.orchestration.*, typing, and stdlib; zero direct access to core.runtime, core.composition, core.memory

items.description: Critic rejects unsafe plans (empty intent, over-budget)
items.evidence: CriticAgent.evaluate_plan returns is_valid=False for empty intent and over-budget; tests verify rejection

items.description: Guard: Planning → Criticizing requires valid plan
Guard: Cross-tenant transition blocked without scope
Guard: Oscillation blocked (same plan hash → abort)
Guard: Max retry exceeded → abort transition
Guard: Abort allowed from any state

items.evidence: test_full_lifecycle validates entire state machine path
